bias.analyst: First contact, first verdict: the giant floor ABSORBED the opening attack - a classic volume-climax-into-absorption sequence with a failed breakdown that snapped right back. The wall barely lost size defending, and the layer beneath it actually grew. New cushions are forming just above. Most likely day now: a defended-floor range. Theo stays flat - momentum hasn't recovered enough to permit longs, fading at walls is a retired play, and the half-hour classification finishes shortly. Sometimes the best read is the one you don't trade yet.
bias.commentator: FIRST REAL ATTACK ON THE BOX - AND THE WALL HOLDS! The away strikers threw everything at the goal line, the crowd roared, the keeper stood tall - and the rebound flew straight back upfield! The defense barely lost a man and the reserves behind them DOUBLED. Theo's manager, arms crossed: 'beautiful defending - not our moment yet. The half-hour whistle is coming, then we pick our game.' The crowd is chanting the back line's name!

events.analyst: Theo Live is now public. From here on, session events appear in this feed with a delay - wins, losses, and the days we sit on our hands.
events.commentator: Welcome to the grounds! The gates are open for the first time. Pre-season record is on the board - including the losses. We hide nothing here, folks.

events.analyst: Market open. Theo watches the first 30 minutes before committing - the [indicator] decides which playbook is valid today.
events.commentator: KICKOFF! The bell rings and we're underway. Theo holds its shape for the first half hour - no wild lunges before the game shows its pattern.
